prereq.p: You need a GitHub account. If you do not have one, create a free account at github.com before continuing.

step.cmd: In VS Code, open the Extensions panel and search for GitHub Copilot.
Install the GitHub Copilot extension published by GitHub.
When prompted, click Sign in to GitHub and authorise VS Code in your browser.
Return to VS Code. A Copilot icon appears in the bottom status bar, confirming activation.

result.p: GitHub Copilot is active. You now have access to the free tier, which includes Copilot Chat and inline code suggestions.
